weight_transform: none (activation-only op); when applied to weights at load time (e.g. weight_to_bfp8), it converts weight tensor dtype in-place: w = ttnn.typecast(w, ttnn.bfloat8_b)
applicability_notes: constraints: ['Input must be interleaved; sharded memory configs are not supported (tests explicitly convert sharded->interleaved via ttnn.to_memory_config before typecast)', 'Typically requires TILE_LAYOUT; call sites convert ROW_MAJOR indices to TILE before typecast to avoid alignment issues, then back', 'Common fusion neighbors: precedes rotary_embedding (requires bf16), SDPA (bf8_b inputs), fill_cache/paged_fill_cache (cast to cache dtype), all_gather (cast to bfp8 to halve CCL bandwidth)', "Frequently guarded by 'if x.dtype != target_dtype' — elide when dtypes already match"]

placement_observations.size_descriptor: any (e.g. [3,128,32] eltwise outputs in unit tests)
placement_observations.source: test: 'Since typecast does not support sharded config, we can convert the sharded tensor to interleaved'; output_tensor = ttnn.to_memory_config(output_tensor_sharded, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); ttnn.typecast(output_tensor, dtype=ttnn.uint32)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: KV heads prefill activations [1, n_kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim]
placement_observations.source: falcon attention: ttnn.experimental.typecast(key_layer, self.model_config['KV_CACHE_DTYPE'], memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) feeding ttnn.fill_cache

placement_observations.size_descriptor: K/V prefill states [bsz, nh, seq_len, head_dim] before slice_write into cache
placement_observations.source: k_bf8 = ttnn.typecast(key_states, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); v_bf8 = ttnn.typecast(value_states, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: replicated hidden states [1, 1, seq, hidden] before all_gather_async (cast to BFP8 to reduce CCL bandwidth)
placement_observations.source: if replicated_hidden_states.dtype != self.model_config['BFP8_DTYPE']: replicated_hidden_states = ttnn.experimental.typecast(replicated_hidden_states, self.model_config['BFP8_DTYPE'], memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) followed by ttnn.experimental.all_gather_async

placement_observations.size_descriptor: K/V heads prefill [1, n_kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim] cast to bfloat8_b/cache dtype before fill_cache; subsequently sharded only when seq_len large
placement_observations.source: k_heads_1KSD_8b = ttnn.typecast(k_heads_1KSD, dtype=keys_BKSD.dtype); if seq_len >= self.min_kv_prefill_shard_seqlen and not self.TG and not page_table: k_fill = ttnn.interleaved_to_sharded(k_heads_1KSD_8b, self.args.get_attn_kv_prefill_mem_config(seq_len))

placement_observations.size_descriptor: Q heads prefill [1, n_heads, seq_len, head_dim] cast to bfloat8_b before SDPA
placement_observations.source: q_heads_1QSD_8b = ttnn.typecast(q_heads_1QSD, dtype=self.activation_dtype or ttnn.bfloat8_b) feeding ttnn.transformer.(chunked_)scaled_dot_product_attention

placement_observations.size_descriptor: Q/K heads pre-rotary [1, heads, seq_len, head_dim]; rotary_embedding_llama requires bfloat16 inputs
placement_observations.source: if q_heads_1QSD_pre_rot.dtype != ttnn.bfloat16: q_heads_1QSD_pre_rot = ttnn.typecast(q_heads_1QSD_pre_rot, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16) before ttnn.experimental.rotary_embedding_llama

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention output summed over experts [1, 1, M, H] cast to bfloat8_b before all_reduce
placement_observations.source: tt_sum = ttnn.typecast(tt_sum, ttnn.bfloat8_b); tt_output = ttnn.all_reduce(tt_sum, ..., memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention masks [B, heads, q_len, k_len] cast to bfloat4_b for memory savings, replicated across mesh
placement_observations.source: tt_xattn_mask = ttnn.to_layout(tt_xattn_mask, ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT); tt_xattn_mask = ttnn.typecast(tt_xattn_mask, ttnn.bfloat4_b) (mask tensor created with memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: topk indices [B*S, topk] — cast must occur in TILE_LAYOUT to avoid alignment issues, then convert to ROW_MAJOR for dispatch
placement_observations.source: comment: 'Typecast in TILE_LAYOUT to avoid alignment issues, then convert to ROW_MAJOR'; indices = ttnn.to_layout(indices, ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT); indices = ttnn.typecast(indices, ttnn.int32); indices = ttnn.to_layout(indices, ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT)
